title: The Straw Hats Break Through Totto Land
description: On pages 15–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Katakuri, Big Mom, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Reiju as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you knew where he was right now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You would probably think "that's great", right?

dialogue.speaker: Katakuri
dialogue.text: Can you see the future, too?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: but I definitely won't for- give him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all that he did to my big brother....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the smell of the sweet cake that's within...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But there's no benefit to us, no siree.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will you pass through this land of candy??

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Or will you stay to be played with willingly?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's nothing in this world more frightening than that mouthwater- ing sweetness.

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Soul POCUS a mama's willful-) mess.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Will you give me your life?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Or will you choose... to die in Strife?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: TIP! Some minor liberties have been taken to make the song flow.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With the help of a powerful "whichield", the straw hat crew has successfully...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: escaped from the territory of a Yonkou...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey... would it be alright... if I whip up some food?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The truth is, I'm really hungry...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Did something happen while I was gone?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Owner Zeff!! Let's kick them out already.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why should we cook for them!? They're bad guys!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's fine. I'll cook their meal, so just be quiet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Hurry up and bring the food!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Okay, okay. No matter the time of day, they'll still get hungry.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter the kind of person it is, they'll still get hungry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I'll feed anyone who wishes to eat!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is what it means to be father and 'son!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 56 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
